description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 12th; Slot none; price 6,000 gp; Weight â. DESCRIPTION This stone grants you a +5 competence bonus on Ride checks. Any horse or pony you ride gains the benefits of the Fleet feat. Cracked: This stone grants a +1 competence bonus on Ride checks. Price: 200 gp. Flawed: This stone grants a +5 competence bonus to Ride checks. Price: 5,000 gp. See Inferior Ioun Stones for details on cracked and flawed variant stones. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, charm animal, longstrider; Special creator must be 12th level; Cost 3,000 gp
